svg.text: qoala-mlir docs · Operations reference / QMem, Architecture / IRs

div.p: A "quantum memory bank" rectangle subdivided into slots, each labeled by an i32 qubit pointer (e.g. %q0, %q1, …). Side-effecting ops act on slots:

ul.li: %qptr = qmem.qalloc → arrow pointing into a slot.
qmem.init %qptr, qmem.rot_x %qptr, %a, qmem.cnot %qptr, %qptr2 → arrows annotated with MemWrite hitting the relevant slots.
%m = qmem.measure %qptr : i1 → returns a classical i1 outcome on the right.

div.p: The figure should contrast with qnet-op-anatomy.svg: at MIR level, ops mutate slots rather than producing new SSA quantum values.
